title: Toolkits for detailed and high-throughput interrogation of synapses in C. elegans
notes: Presents WormPsyQi, an automated image analysis pipeline for high-throughput quantification of synaptic puncta in C. elegans, alongside a resource of 30 transgenic reporter strains labeling chemical and electrical synapses throughout the nervous system. Quantifies synapse number, size, intensity, and spatial distribution across neuron types, developmental stages, and sexes.
